title: Minecraft but, you are a God
description: This mod allows you to become a minecraft god
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FQDDjAdZWQQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This mod allows you to become a minecraft god
As soon as you spawn you will get to choose a role god or human, i made it so you can play manhunt with your friends
If you choose god you will get god ability and god shop but if you select human then you become a normal player.
You can break block to gain points and from the items.

**Items in the mod:**

1.Holy pickaxe: this mine 3 x 3 block.

2.Lighting stab: this summon lighting in impact.

3.Minecraft heart: give you a second chance when you almost die.

4.God Armor: gives you armor stronger than netherite.

5.God clock: stop time for 30 seconds and cooldown for 1 minute.

6.Wings: allow you to fly.

7.Nuke: summon a nuke that cause Destruction.

8.Angel: summon angels to fight for you.

9.Creative mod: give you creative mod for 30 seconds.

10.Command: allow you to choose from 12 different ability.

11.**God command: works like command chat but you have to use your username not @s, @p, 
only if you will @e[type= and etc.**
